name: Pinch to Scale

inputs.name: Target
inputs.description: The scene object to be scaled up or down

inputs.name: Scale Sensitivity
inputs.description: The rate at which a scene object scales in relation to the fingers' movement. A higher value will scale the object as fast as the fingers, while a negative value will scale the object in the reverse direction of the finger. Value range: -10 to 10

description: Shrinks or enlarges a scene object when two fingers move inward or outward
